ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Continued To Feb-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there is no inventory and appraisal, and no petition for final distribution. Mr. Dobrov stated that he submitted a petition on Thursday, that there is no inventory and appraisal, and that letters were issued only for the purpose of pursuing a wrongful death suit in Florida. The Court informed Mr. Dobrov that the petition was not showing up in the e-file queue, that he needs to look into it, and that he needs to file a petition and provide a proposed order. Status on close of estate is continued to February 16, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Dobrov is to have his petition on file by February 9, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
